chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 917 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3921/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.3922/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.06.2025 Mr. Ather Hussain Abro, Advocate along with Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
